title: Limited Orders Malfunction
text-1: This message is to inform you that yesterday, February 5th, 2018, a system malfunction occurred in the trading engine and disabled the processing of limit orders activation.
text-2: We have identified the orders that have been affected and refunded your losses to your trading account.
text-3: The malfunction has since been fixed and appropriate precautions are being taken to prevent such errors from happening in the future.
regards:
Please accept our apologies for this inconvenience.
Kindest regards,
The IQ Option Team
